CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Responses To First Sets Of Post-Judgment Interrogatories And Requests For Production
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian T. Hafter, of Rimon, P.C., Tel. 415.964.5207, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PLAINTIFF RON BELLER Motion To Compel Responses To First Sets Of Post-Judgment Interrogatories And Requests For Production is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Paoli; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
